title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 05 November 2021
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 05 November 2021
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 05 November 2021
summary:
Main
The subcontinent recycling market is going strong even after some corrections witnessed in the global scrap prices as the persisting lack of tonnage
Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2021-11-06_best-oasis-weekly-recycling-market-report-05-november-2021_weekly-ship-recycling-report_45d38b0ba069.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2021-11-06_best-oasis-weekly-recycling-market-report-05-november-2021_weekly-ship-recycling-report_45d38b0ba069.pdf

[Page 1]
WEEKLY
hekllenic
SHIP
RECYCLING
REPORT
29th October 2021 to 5th November 2021
Highlights of the Week
The subcontinent recycling market is going strong even after some corrections
jhhnhu
witnessed in the global scrap prices as the persisting lack of tonnage has
enc ouraged end buyers to secure the available units at prevailing prices. Due to
ong oing festivals, Indian buyers have remained muted this week giving more
opportunities to their counterparts in Bangladesh and Pakistan. Bangladesh is
leading the price charts due to the rising demand for steel in the region which
has kept the ship plate prices firm.
